protein_name: Phosphorylates a large number of substrates in the cytoplasm and the nucleus. Belongs to the protein kinase superfamily. AGC Ser/Thr protein kinase family. cAMP subfamily. Testis specific. But important tissues such as brain and ovary have not been analyzed for the content of transcript. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
